definitions.text: A group of entities previously mentioned. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: Fred and Jane? They just arrived.
Dogs may bark if they want to be fed.

definitions.text: To refer to (someone, sometimes especially someone who does not use gender-neutral pronouns) using they/them pronouns.
examples: I have a pin that says she/her, but I still get theyed all the time.
